diagnostic: High-stakes decisions paralyze because the cost of error is existential. A purpose-governed boardroom reduces that cost by ensuring every decision is aligned with your mission before it executes.
answer: High-stakes decisions paralyze because the cost of error is existential. A purpose-governed boardroom reduces that cost by ensuring every decision is aligned with your mission before it executes.
description: Human bandwidth ceiling — the leader moves from finance to marketing to production in a single afternoon, crushed by context switches.
symptom: 15–25 hours per week in alignment meetings. Decision fatigue. Founder burnout. Family strain.
